title: Arachnothryx povedae
taxonomy: Arachnothryx povedae is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Arachnothryx, which is part of the larger Rubiaceae family of flowering plants. The classification of Arachnothryx povedae is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, clade: Angiosperms, clade: Eudicots, clade: Asterids, order: Gentianales, family: Rubiaceae, genus: Arachnothryx, species: A. povedae.
